title: Chief Risk & Ethics Officer
summary: The risk and ethics leader responsible for exposure review, ethical governance, compliance alignment, and institutional survivability.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the Chief Risk & Ethics Officer role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The risk and ethics leader responsible for exposure review, ethical governance, compliance alignment, and institutional survivability.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Protect Neuroartan from preventable ethical, legal-adjacent, reputational, operational, and systemic risks as the platform expands.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
